title: EALLEN Travel Mug with Leakproof Lid,Insulated Reusable Coffee Mug for Hot&Cold Drinks/Tea,Portable Stainless Steel Thermal Takeaway Travel Coffee Cup for Car/Outdoor/Picnic/Office/School (Black)
features: KEEP DRINKS HOT OR COLD FOR HOURS - Our travel insulated mug keeps drinks hot or cold for up to 4-6 hours. Double wall stainless steel vacuum insulation design and advanced seamless internal technology ensure that temperatures are maintained and help you enjoy delicious drinks at any time. It is a great travel mug especially for hot drinks.

Leakproof Travel Coffee Mug - This travel coffee mug comes with a safe BPA free screw top lid and a premium silicone seal ring, meaning your drink will be airtight protected to minimize the chance of spills. Ensures that it won't leak out if it's turned over or stored in a bag. (Note: Please check the lid is firmly fixed before putting it in a bag) It also has a splash proof lid for easy drinking, just open the sipping hole.

NON-SLIP GRIP & BOTTOM DESIGN - The surface with powder matte finish and non-slip grip not only make the thermal cups look stylish, but also provide a comfortable way to hold. The rubber bottom effectively prevents the coffee cup from slipping and tipping. Also, shut up when you put it on the table.

PERFECT CAPACITY TRAVEL COFFEE MUG - Leakproof travel coffee mug with a 380ml capacity and beautiful shape, bring you a good sense of use. You can enjoy coffee, tea, hot drinks and other drinks anytime, anywhere. In addition, the bottom diameter of the cup is 70mm, which fits most car cup holders and backpack pockets.

GREAT GIFT IDEA - This reusable coffee cup has been carefully coated with matte powder, fashionable and elegant. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor, such as outdoor adventures, travel, sporting events, car, home, work, party, school and office and other occasions. This thermal travel mug is also a perfect gift for family and friends.
description: Product Description ■About Us： 1，We have been producing travel mug for many years. We are a professional manufacturer with rich experience. 2，Our goal is to use high quality materials and excellent production process, to produce products that satisfy our customers.
